positive: A whimsical, stylish composition featuring a stylized constellation map overlaid onto a grouping of blooming botanical elements. The main subject should be a central, stylized night sky motif with subtle glowing lines connecting celestial points, surrounded by hyper-detailed, yet flat-graphic-friendly, flora like crescent moons, stylized ferns, and delicate star clusters. Use a limited color palette of deep indigo, muted gold, sage green, and creamy off-white. The style must be modern minimalist, combining cosmic fantasy with elegant botanical illustration, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Strong contrast is key, with clean silhouettes and clear separation between elements. Composition should be highly centered and symmetrical, designed for optimal repeatability as a print repeat pattern.
negative: blurry, messy, cluttered, realistic photo, watermark, signature, text, logo, artifacts, noisy, low contrast, grain, extra limbs, bad anatomy, copyright, celebrity, ultra-detailed, 3d render, bokeh
